pages.raw_text:
The brewing interests Of the
state are now denying that the
price of beer was raised to the sa-
looms more than year ago for the
express purpose of using the excess
charged as a campaign fund this
fall in opposition to liquor legisla-
ton. They admitted it at the time.


Henry Mcbride is known to have
a fund of 100000 behind him in
his fight for the governorship on
the republican ticket. 1t is not
denied that he Is endorsed by the
liquor dealers because he vetoed a
local option bill while acting as
governor.


Gov. Mead has announced his in
tention of standing by the local OPP
ton plank, hence he is the marked
enemy of the liquor men regardless
of politics.


Simon Mcleod, one of McBride's
managers, has announced that he
las lined up the saloon interests Of
Everett for Mcbride.


The same campaign is going on
in Spokane and elsewhere, and the
saloon interests are falling in line
behind the man tfHy think will pro,
tect them from temperance legisla
tiOn
